title: Playful Brand Icon Collection

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a cohesive collection of playful icons for AURELIA, a premium skincare brand brand. Style should be rounded 3D minimal with a deep teal palette. Use AURORA to give a friendly and modern feel. Maintain consistency across all icons with a unified grid, proportions, and visual language. Icons should represent fast setup, smart automation, clean sharing. Ensure high clarity, balanced spacing, and scalable design suitable for UI, apps, and branding.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

Create a cohesive collection of playful icons for AURELIA, a premium skincare brand brand. Style should be rounded 3D minimal with a deep teal palette. Use AURORA to give a friendly and modern feel. Maintain consistency across all icons with a unified grid, proportions, and visual language. Icons should represent fast setup, smart automation, clean sharing. Ensure high clarity, balanced spacing, and scalable design suitable for UI, apps, and branding.
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.
